name: Savanna Sam
short_description: Savanna Sam is a 3D action game where you take over the controls of Sam’s trusty biplane and help him on his dangerous journey. Make sure Sam reaches his destination and can make his delivery!
detailed_description:
Savanna Sam is a 3D action game where you take over the controls of Sam’s trusty biplane and help him on his dangerous journey. Make sure Sam reaches his destination and can make his delivery!

The gameplay of Savanna Sam is similar to console classic Star Fox, replacing the shooting with even more barrel rolls!

  • Evade all obstacles in the colorful levels.

  • Make sure both Sam and his plane reach the end of the level without a scratch!

  • Collect all the golden rings and items popping up throughout the levels.

  • Rotate Sam to fit through any gap.

  • Use Sam’s neck to collect even hard to reach items.

  • Play through the story mode to see how Sam’s adventure unfolds.

Do you have what it takes to make the trip through the Savanna?
